# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

static_resources:
  listeners:
    - name: admin_listener
      address:
        socket_address:
          address: 0.0.0.0
          port_value: 9901

admin:
  access_log_path: /var/log/envoy/admin_access.log
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901
  profile_path: /tmp/envoy.prof
  dns_refresh_rate: 5s
  skip_dst_lookup_on_host_removal: true
  enable_stats_sinks: true
  stats_config:
    use_all_default_tags: true
  stats_flush_interval: 5s
  endpoint:
    path: /stats
  health_check:
    path: /healthz
  access_log_format: |
    [%START_TIME%] "%REQ(:METHOD)% %REQ(X-ENVOY-ORIGINAL-PATH?:PATH)% %PROTOCOL%" %RESPONSE_CODE% %RESPONSE_FLAGS% %BYTES_RECEIVED% %BYTES_SENT% %DURATION% "%REQ(USER-AGENT)%" "%REQ(X-FORWARDED-FOR)%"

layered_runtime:
  layers:
    - name: static_layer
      static_layer:
        envoy:
          admin:
            access_log_path: /var/log/envoy/admin_access.log
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: 0.0.0.0
                port_value: 9901
            enable_stats_sinks: true
            stats_flush_interval: 5s
